title: moussonia fruticosa
intro: Moussonia fruticosa, also known as the "monkey plant," is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Moussonia fruticosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Moussonia fruticosa are typically made from its leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
